semantic.role: TypeScript interface defining a metadata wrapper for SpineUnit with line count, used by infrastructure components for index reading.
responsibilities: Defines the LoadedUnit interface combining a SpineUnit with its line count.
Provides a typed structure for tracking source file metadata during processing.
Serves as a data transfer object for index reading operations.
outOfScope: Implementation of index reading or processing logic.
invariants: Pure type definition with no executable code.
Located in a core types directory, not subject to service/infra boundary rules.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a shared, strongly-typed contract for metadata about loaded source units across the system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; the git intent references view generator refactoring, which does not affect this core type.
